zh.lifeSummary: Etheridge FitzRoger是Richard FitzRoger的女兒，於大約1130年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾其朋納姆。她於1148年與Jordon Fitzessulf de Thornhill在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1174年在英國英格蘭越可爾恩爾享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Etheridge FitzRoger是Richard FitzRoger的女儿，于大约1130年出生在英国英格兰維爾爾其朋納姆。她于1148年与Jordon Fitzessulf de Thornhill在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1174年在英国英格兰越可爾恩爾享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Etheridge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Etherich, a variant of Old English Æthelrīc (see Aldridge ).
sometimes perhaps a variant of Edridge, from the Middle English personal name Edrich, Edrick (Old English Ēadrīc, from ēad ‘prosperity’ + rīc ‘powerful’).

variants.name: Ethridge
meanings: English (East Anglia and southeastern England): variant of   Etheridge  .

variants.name: Attridge
meanings: topographic name for someone dwelling ‘at the ridge’, from Middle English atte rygge (Old English æt thǣm hrycge). The name was taken in the 16th century to Ireland, where it is common in County Cork.
variant of Etheridge , from the Middle English personal name Etherich, a variant of Old English Æthelrīc.

variants.name: Aldridge
meanings: from the Middle English personal names Alrich or Elrich and Aldrich or Eldrich, representing any one of three Old English personal names, Æthelrīc, Ælfrīc, and Ealdrīc, formed respectively from æthel- ‘noble’, ælf ‘elf, sprite’, and (e)ald ‘old, honored’ + rīc ‘ruler’.

habitational name from Aldridge (Staffordshire), Aldridge Grove in Hampden (Buckinghamshire), or from a similarly named unidentified place in the West Midlands, recorded in Domesday Book as Alrewic, from Old English alor ‘alder’ + wīc ‘specialized farmstead’.

en.lifeSummary: Etheridge FitzRoger was born about 1130, in Chippenham, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Richard FitzRoger. She married Jordon Fitzessulf de Thornhill in 1148, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1174, in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Etheridge FitzRoger est née environ 1130, à Chippenham, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Richard FitzRoger. Elle a épousé Jordon Fitzessulf de Thornhill en 1148, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1174, à Thornhill, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Etheridge FitzRoger wurde um 1130 in Chippenham, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Richard FitzRoger geboren. Sie hat 1148 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Jordon Fitzessulf de Thornhill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1174 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Etheridge FitzRoger è nata il circa 1130 nel Chippenham, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Richard FitzRoger. Lei sposato Jordon Fitzessulf de Thornhill nel 1148, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1174, nel Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Etheridge FitzRogerは約1130年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアチップエンハムでRichard FitzRogerの娘として生まれた。1148年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでJordon Fitzessulf de Thornhillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1174年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアソルンヒルで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Etheridge FitzRoger(은)는 대략 1130년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 치펜함에서 Richard FitzRoger의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1148년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Jordon Fitzessulf de Thornhill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1174년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 토른힐에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Etheridge FitzRoger nasceu aproximadamente 1130, em Chippenham, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Richard FitzRoger. Ela casou-se com Jordon Fitzessulf de Thornhill em 1148, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1174, em Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Etheridge FitzRoger родилась около 1130 г. в местности чиппенам, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Richard FitzRoger. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jordon Fitzessulf de Thornhill в 1148 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1174 г. в местности таурнилл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Etheridge FitzRoger nació aproximadamente 1130, en Chippenham, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de Richard FitzRoger. Se casó con Jordon Fitzessulf de Thornhill en 1148, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1174, en Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 45 años.
